Back This Series on Kickstarter Get Book One Now
For the Bridge Generation

You raised your child to think.
Now give them a story
that honors that.

Nova and the Magic of Faith was written for the parent who deconstructed from institutional religion but never stopped believing in something larger — and who wants their child to grow up with that same reverence, without the doctrine. Rooted in Christ consciousness, universal law, Gnostic wisdom, and ancestral love.

"A Return to Humanity. Teaching Children They Are the Magic."

Back the Series · Campaign Live Now
Why This Series Exists

The book you wished existed
when you were asking the same questions.

Most children's books about faith require you to choose a side. Nova does not. It meets children — and the adults reading to them — exactly where they are: curious, wondering, and full of magic they have not been taught to name yet.

✦ Christ Consciousness

The teachings of Yeshua as universal truth — not religious doctrine. Love, healing, and the power that lives in all of us.

🌿 Ancestral Wisdom

Stories rooted in lineage, memory, and the women who came before. A bridge between generations, built in love.

🌙 Universal Law

Children taught that they are the magic — not waiting for it, not hoping for it. Already it. Always it.

I Want This for My Child
The Complete Series

Four Books. One Journey.
A Legacy for Every Generation.
